commands.notes: Requires .NET SDK 11.0.100-preview.5.26227.104; bootstrap by running ./build.sh first. --treenode-filter not available in this project; use --filter 'ClassName~Name' instead

frameworks.Microsoft.Testing.Platform.UnitTests: MSTest ([TestClass]/[TestMethod]) + MSTest Assert (AwesomeAssertions BANNED per BannedSymbols.txt)

testing_notes.stylecop_rules: SA1512: no blank line after single-line comments. SA1025: no multiple consecutive spaces. Applies to test files.
testing_notes.service_provider: Use concrete ServiceProvider class — AddService(obj) for registration
testing_notes.implicit_usings: Enabled in all projects — System, System.Linq, System.Globalization etc. auto-included
testing_notes.configureawait: CA2007 is set to 'none' in test/.editorconfig — ConfigureAwait(false) is NOT required in tests
testing_notes.internal_access: InternalsVisibleTo includes Microsoft.Testing.Platform.UnitTests — internal classes like LLMEnvironmentDetector are accessible
testing_notes.moq_usage: Mock<IEnvironment> is the standard pattern for environment mocking in tests
testing_notes.global_usings_test: test/Directory.Build.targets adds global usings for Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder, Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Extensions, Microsoft.VisualStudio.TestTools.UnitTesting, Microsoft.Testing.TestInfrastructure — so CompositeExtensionFactory<T> and ValidationResult are available without explicit using
testing_notes.treenode_filter: MTP UnitTests project uses --filter 'ClassName~X' (not --treenode-filter, which is unsupported there)

repo_constraints: No VB.NET tests for analyzer projects

backlog.notes: Static state makes deterministic testing difficult. Needs investigation.

backlog.notes: Good overall coverage already. Could add boundary cases.

backlog.title: Unit tests for ChatClientManager
backlog.notes: Simple class with null/duplicate registration guards. Low priority.

completed.summary: Added 38 tests for LLMEnvironmentDetector: null guard, AnyPresentRule, BooleanRule (truthy/falsy), ValueRule (case-insensitive), AnyMatchRule (Copilot)
